notes:
ra đời = to be born. It’s used for people, but also for things when they “come into existence.”

With people, it focuses on the moment of birth. With products, ideas, books, companies, etc., it means they are created or officially introduced.

You can also add time/place after it.

Close synonym for people: sinh ra (more about the act of being born). For things, xuất hiện is similar but more like “appear” than “be born.”

definitions.en: to be born; to come into existence.

example.vi: Cô ấy ra đời vào năm 1990.

exampleSentences: Con gái của chị vừa mới ra đời tuần trước nên cả nhà rất vui.
Nhiều sản phẩm công nghệ mới ra đời mỗi năm khiến cuộc sống tiện lợi hơn.
Khi một ý tưởng sáng tạo ra đời, nó có thể thay đổi cả thế giới.
notes_md:
**ra đời** = to be born. It’s used for people, but also for things when they “come into existence.”

With people, it focuses on the moment of birth. With products, ideas, books, companies, etc., it means they are created or officially introduced.

You can also add time/place after it.

Close synonym for people: **sinh ra** (more about the act of being born). For things, **xuất hiện** is similar but more like “appear” than “be born.”
exampleSentencesTranslated: My sister's daughter was just be born last week so the whole family is very happy.
Many new technology products be born every year, making life more convenient.
When a creative idea be born, it can change the whole world.
